metadata.description: Reproducible review disposition for bounded AI-assisted semantic review batches. Candidate IDs refer to the generated FullDictionaryAudit CSV files and are protected by an exact-scope fingerprint.
metadata.policy: Only clear exact-sense errors become corrections. A reverse-dictionary or translation candidate alone is not proof; unresolved polysemy and indirect evidence remain deferred.

batches.selection_policy: First 500 unreviewed exact senses ordered by descending number of supporting review queues, then evidence score and deterministic lexical order.
batches.confirmed_no_change_reason: The current Traditional Chinese definition independently agrees with the exact-sense Kaikki translation evidence; the CC-CEDICT hit is an indirect compound or polysemous reverse-lookup match and does not justify replacement.
batches.deferred_reason: The available candidate is indirect, broader or narrower than the exact English sense, polysemous, specialist, archaic, or lacks sufficiently independent exact-sense evidence. Existing data is preserved until a reliable source or a more detailed manual review resolves it.

batches.selection_policy: Next 500 unreviewed exact senses ordered by descending number of supporting review queues, then evidence score and deterministic lexical order.
batches.confirmed_no_change_reason: The current Chinese definition directly agrees with an exact-sense Kaikki translation or an unambiguous open-source proper-name or terminology match.
batches.deferred_reason: The candidate is indirect, broader or narrower than the exact English sense, potentially polysemous, specialist, archaic, or lacks sufficiently independent exact-sense evidence. Existing data is preserved.

batches.selection_policy: Next 500 unreviewed exact senses ordered by descending number of supporting review queues, then evidence score and deterministic lexical order.
batches.confirmed_no_change_reason: The current Traditional Chinese definition directly agrees with the exact English sense or is an acceptable established proper-name/technical term after review.
batches.deferred_reason: The candidate is indirect, broader or narrower than the exact English sense, potentially polysemous, specialist, archaic, or lacks sufficiently independent exact-sense evidence. Existing data is preserved.

batches.selection_policy: Remaining unreviewed exact senses ordered by descending number of supporting review queues, then evidence score and deterministic lexical order. This catch-up pass records unresolved candidates as deferred rather than guessing.
batches.confirmed_no_change_reason: No additional exact-sense no-change decisions were made in this catch-up pass.
batches.deferred_reason: The candidate requires independent exact-sense evidence or manual lexicographic review. Existing data is preserved; no machine-translated or weak reverse-lookup replacement is applied.
